perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a POV shot of an airplane cabin, showing two passengers across the aisle: a man in a grey sweater and a woman in a leopard-print hat. Both are wearing masks and look toward the camera. (2) The camera focuses down on an airplane meal tray. Hands enter the frame and meticulously begin folding napkins, tying plastic bags, and nesting empty containers into each other to maximize space. (3) The process continues as individual food wrappers are compressed and tucked into the main plastic tray. (4) A quick cut shows a completely cleared and organized tray with all waste contained under the lid of one bowl. (5) A brief comparison shot shows a different, messy tray with items scattered. (6) The video concludes with the man in the grey sweater putting his hands together in a gesture of gratitude and giving a thumbs-up while pointing at his neat tray.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop track begins immediately and plays throughout the entire video. There are no spoken vocals detected. (2) The music maintains a consistent rhythm without any significant shifts in tone or volume. (3) The subtle, constant white noise of an airplane cabin (engine hum) is audible in the background behind the music. (4) Occasional low-frequency sound effects (soft rustling/thuds) accompany the visual actions of cleaning, but they are mostly masked by the BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV：潔癖人吃飛機餐' (Hook text, excited tone). (2) '難道只有我會這樣？' (Hook text, questioning tone). (3) '垃圾打結！！捏扁！！' (Instructional text, emphatic tone). (4) '全部收好！' (Action description). (5) '吃完就要這麼乾淨！' (Goal-oriented text). (6) '大部分人吃完都這麼亂！' (Comparison text, observational). (7) '整齊乾淨 沒有疊餐碗 這樣空服員收走時 垃圾不會亂飛亂噴，是不是很棒？！' (Explanatory/Summary text, encouraging tone).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Cleaning Demonstration -> Result Comparison -> Final Endorsement

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male in a grey sweater and 1 female in a leopard print hat are visible in the opening and closing shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male wearing a grey and black striped sweater and a white surgical mask.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of an airplane cabin, featuring grey economy-class seats, tray tables, and oval windows showing bright daylight.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light from cabin windows combined with interior overhead lights.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to share a social etiquette 'life hack' for air travel, specifically targeting people with a high standard for cleanliness or 'OCD' traits. It demonstrates how to neatly pack away airplane meal remains to assist flight attendants and maintain personal space hygiene. It uses a relatable 'POV' hook to engage viewers and concludes by highlighting the benefits of this behavior.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While the EVA Air logo is visible, the content focuses on personal habits and etiquette rather than promoting the airline's specific services.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of 'POV' perspective combined with high-density variety-show style text overlays and a focus on neatness habits.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video fits the trend of 'satisfying' cleaning content, utilizing the social pressure of 'how most people do it' versus 'the better way' to drive engagement.
